conbody.p: You are not a developer and don't plan to become one? Nevertheless you need to find your way around scripting and language processing? Then this minicourse is for you!
Get real work done: Run scripts on your own files and output results. No boring coding exercises or tutorials. Just hands-on instruction that you can put to use right away.
This 20-minute rapid setup guide walks you through the minimum steps required to run Python scripts on your own files and output the results as files. No prior programming experience is needed.

ul.li: Think about code as a tool, not a mystery
Set up VS Code as your working environment
Install Python and the required NLP packages
Read error messages and fix common problems
Activate GitHub Copilot to assist you
Run a script on your file

section.title: Prerequisites
section.p: No programming knowledge is required. You only need a computer with internet access.
